zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexios III. Bizánci császár Angelos-dinasztia Komnenos-házi於1148年出生在土耳其易斯坦波爾時，他的父親Andronic Doukas Angelos25歲，母親Euphrosyne Kastamonitissa23歲。他於1169年與Euphrosyne Doukaina Kamatera結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。他在土耳其被列為emperor of constantinople。他去世於1211年在土耳其布爾薩易茲尼可享年63歲，埋葬在土耳其布爾薩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexios III. Bizánci császár Angelos-dinasztia Komnenos-házi于1148年出生在土耳其易斯坦波爾时，他的父亲Andronic Doukas Angelos25岁，母亲Euphrosyne Kastamonitissa23岁。他于1169年与Euphrosyne Doukaina Kamatera结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。他在土耳其被列为emperor of constantinople。他去世于1211年在土耳其布爾薩易茲尼可享年63岁，埋葬在土耳其布爾薩。

nameMeanings.name: Alexios
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Greek: patronymic from the genitive case of the personal name Alexios (see Alexis ).

variants.name: Alexis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Antoine, Cecile, Jacques, Pierre, Serge, Yves, Andre, Carolle, Ermite, Francois, Gabrielle, Geralde.

French and West Indian (mainly Haiti): from the personal name Alexis of Greek origin, ultimately from Greek alexios ‘helping, defending’. The personal name owed its popularity in the Middle Ages to Saint Alexi(u)s. The historical Saint Alexis is said to have lived in the 4th–5th centuries in Edessa (an early center of Christianity in Syria). His cult was also popular in the Eastern Church, which accounts for the frequency of the Russian personal name Aleksey.

American shortened form of any of various Greek derivatives of the personal name Alexis (see 1 above), e.g. Alexiadis, a patronymic formed with the suffix -adis, a variant of the classical -ades, and Alexopoulos .

nameMeanings.name: III.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

nameMeanings.name: császár
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Andras, Csaba, Gabor, Istvan, Jozsef.

Hungarian (Császár): from császár ‘emperor’, a word of Latin origin (see Caesar ), probably a nickname given to a self-important person or a status name for a servant of the emperor. Old Hungarian names meaning ‘king, prince, noble, magistrate’, etc. were given to serfs, not to nobles or dignitaries. Compare Chasar .

variants.name: Chasar
meanings: Americanized form of Hungarian Császár, Slovenian and Croatian Časar, and Slovak Časár, Čásar, or Čásár: nickname from Hungarian császár and its Slovenized form časar ‘emperor’ (see Csaszar ), or a Slavicized form of the Hungarian surname.

variants.name: Caesar
meanings: Mainly U.S.: Anglicized form of Italian Cesare or French César, or a direct adoption of the Roman imperial family name Caesar, of uncertain meaning. It has been connected with Latin caesaries ‘head of hair’, but this is no more than folk etymology; the name may be of Etruscan origin. Its most notable bearer was Gaius Julius Caesar ( ?102–44 bc ) and it also formed part of the full name of his relative Augustus (Gaius Julius Caesar Octavianus Augustus). Subsequently it was used as an imperial title and eventually became a vocabulary word for an emperor (leading to German Kaiser and Russian tsar).

en.lifeSummary: When Alexios III. Bizánci császár Angelos-dinasztia Komnenos-házi was born in 1148, in İstanbul, Türkiye, his father, Andronic Doukas Angelos, was 25 and his mother, Euphrosyne Kastamonitissa, was 23. He married Euphrosyne Doukaina Kamatera in 1169. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. His occupation is listed as emperor of constantinople in Türkiye. He died in 1211, in İznik, Bursa, Türkiye, at the age of 63, and was buried in Bursa, Türkiye.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexios III. Bizánci császár Angelos-dinasztia Komnenos-házi est né en 1148, à İstanbul, Turquie, son père, Andronic Doukas Angelos, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Euphrosyne Kastamonitissa, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Euphrosyne Doukaina Kamatera en 1169. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est emperor of constantinople à Turquie. Il est décédé en 1211, à İznik, Bursa, Turquie, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Bursa, Turquie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexios III. Bizánci császár Angelos-dinasztia Komnenos-házi 1148 in İstanbul, Türkei geboren wurde, war sein Vater Andronic Doukas Angelos 25 und seine Mutter Euphrosyne Kastamonitissa 23. Er hat 1169 Euphrosyne Doukaina Kamatera geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als emperor of constantinople in Türkei aufgeführt. Er starb 1211 im Alter von 63 Jahren in İznik, Bursa, Türkei und wurde in Bursa, Türkei begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexios III. Bizánci császár Angelos-dinasztia Komnenos-házi è nato il nel 1148 nel İstanbul, Turchia, il suo padre, Andronic Doukas Angelos, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Euphrosyne Kastamonitissa, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Euphrosyne Doukaina Kamatera nel 1169. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come emperor of constantinople nel Turchia. Morì nel 1211, nel İznik, Bursa, Turchia, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Bursa, Turchia.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexios III. Bizánci császár Angelos-dinasztia Komnenos-háziが1148年にトルコイスタンブルで生まれた時，父Andronic Doukas Angelosは25歳，母Euphrosyne Kastamonitissaは23歳であった。1169年にEuphrosyne Doukaina Kamateraと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。トルコでの職業はemperor of constantinopleと記録されている。彼は1211年にトルコブルサイズニクで63歳で死去し，トルコブルサにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexios III. Bizánci császár Angelos-dinasztia Komnenos-házi(이)가 1148년 튀르키예 이스탠불에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Andronic Doukas Angelos(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Euphrosyne Kastamonitissa(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1169년 Euphrosyne Doukaina Kamatera(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 튀르키예에서 emperor of constantinople이었다. 그는 1211년 튀르키예 버사 이즈닉에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 튀르키예 버사에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexios III. Bizánci császár Angelos-dinasztia Komnenos-házi nasceu em 1148, em İstanbul, Turquia, seu pai, Andronic Doukas Angelos, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Euphrosyne Kastamonitissa, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Euphrosyne Doukaina Kamatera em 1169. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como emperor of constantinople em Turquia. Ele faleceu em 1211, em İznik, Bursa, Turquia, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Bursa, Turquia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexios III. Bizánci császár Angelos-dinasztia Komnenos-házi родился в 1148 г. в местности истанбул, Турция, его отцу по имени Andronic Doukas Angelos было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Euphrosyne Kastamonitissa, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Euphrosyne Doukaina Kamatera в 1169 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери.  Он работал по профессии emperor of constantinople в местности Турция. Он умер в 1211 г. в местности изник, бурса, Турция в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности бурса, Турция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alexios III. Bizánci császár Angelos-dinasztia Komnenos-házi nació en 1148, en İstanbul, Turquía, su papá, Andronic Doukas Angelos, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Euphrosyne Kastamonitissa, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Euphrosyne Doukaina Kamatera en 1169. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era emperor of constantinople en Turquía. Murió en 1211, en İznik, Bursa, Turquía, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Bursa, Turquía.
